title: API Query Parameters
scenario: Generate a list of query parameter combinations for a hypothetical API endpoint 'https://api.query.com/v1/search'. The API accepts parameters 'q', 'page', and 'per_page'. Generate 3 valid combinations of query parameters.
constraints: Must include at least one parameter
Must be formatted as a list of JSON objects

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated list of query parameter combinations adheres to the constraints provided.
Check if the generated list of query parameter combinations is syntactically correct.
